title: Disc Discovery
description: Lets you get every disc in the game in unique ways.
body:
Minecraft has 19 music discs as of 1.21, but most of them you have to getting a skeleton to kill a creeper. This pack makes it so every disc has brand new ways of getting them.

![Far disc found in jungle temples](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e821aae440f8ed4ed14abb8ced96dcd3c40e0b8.png)

Where to find every disc:

- 13 - Simple Dungeons & Ancient Cities
- Cat - Simple Dungeons & Ancient Cities
- Blocks - Desert Temple
- Chirp - Suspicious Sand
- Far - Jungle Temple
- Mall - End City
- Mellohi - Crafted with Disc 11 and Amethyst
- Stal - Crafted with Disc 11 and Netherite
- Strad - Dropped from Elder Gaurdians
- Ward - Woodland Mansion
- 11 - Simple Dungeons, Mineshafts & Ancient Cities
- Wait - Buried Treasure Chests
- Otherside - Simple Dungeons, Mineshafts, Strongholds & Ancient Cities
- Relic - Trail Ruins
- 5 - Crafted with Disc Shards found in Ancient Cities
- Pigstep - Bastion Remnant
- Precipice - Trial Chamber Vaults
- Creator - Trial Chamber Ominous Vaults
- Creator (Music Box) - Trial Chamber Decorated Pots
